text:
It was Christmas morning and I found a beautiful snow globe outside my bedroom window. I imagined snowmen playing, Christmas angels flying, and maybe a sleigh nestled among the pine trees.

I brought it inside, admiring the intricate snowflakes swirling around the small world inside. I placed a couple of pinecones at the base — tiny snowglobe animals I had found at a craft shop. They looked pleased.

I positioned myself just right so their fluffy white mittens could be outstretched towards me, looking happy to hear my voice.

"Hello," I whispered, pretending it was them calling.

It was.

After a quick nap under the tree, I was ready for some fun. I reached out and brushed a snowflake onto the pinecone owl's feathers. It fluttered them.

I repeated the magic. Each flake made a different sound — a gentle swoosh, a gentle rustle... I could hear them talking to each other, singing carols in a soft
